message.content:
Rewrite `/Users/aryansurana/client/src/pages/SelectPlan.tsx` with the following exact changes. Read the file first, then make ALL of these changes in one write: ## Changes Required ### 1. Remove $39/$29 Optional Add-on section Remove lines 572-608 entirely — the section that starts with `{/* Video Marketing Add-on — Growth + Pro only, optional */}` and shows `+$39` and `+$29` standalone pricing. ### 2. Remove checkbox toggles from Growth and Pro cards - In the Growth card (`{isGrowth && (` block, lines 301-425), remove the checkbox div (the `onClick={() => setVideoMarketingGrowth(!videoMarketingGrowth)}` div, lines 303-338). Keep the "See all features" expand button and the "Interactive Platform Preview" button. - In the Pro card (`{isPro && (` block, lines 427-561), remove the checkbox div (the `onClick={() => setVideoMarketingPro(!videoMarketingPro)}` div, lines 429-464). Keep the "See all features" expand button and the "Interactive Platform Preview" button. ### 3. State changes - Remove: `videoMarketingGrowth`, `videoMarketingPro` state variables - Add: `const [showVideoDecision, setShowVideoDecision] = useState(false);` - Add: `const [decisionTier, setDecisionTier] = useState<'growth' | 'pro' | null>(null);` - Keep: `expandedFeatures`, `showVideoPreview`, `previewTier`, `confirming` ### 4. Simplify price display The current price section (lines 286-299) dynamically shows total price when `hasVideoMarketing`. Since we remove the checkboxes, simplify it to ALWAYS show the base plan price: ```jsx
{plan.price} {plan.period && {plan.period}}
``` Also remove the `hasVideoMarketing`, `videoPrice`, `basePrice`, `totalPrice` variables (lines 269-272). ### 5. Modify handlePlan for Growth and Pro Replace the growth and pro cases in `handlePlan` so clicking the CTA shows the decision modal instead of going directly to checkout: ```typescript if (slug === "growth") { setDecisionTier('growth'); setShowVideoDecision(true); return; } if (slug === "pro") { setDecisionTier('pro'); setShowVideoDecision(true); return; } ``` ### 6. Add proceedToCheckout function Add this function after `handlePlan`: ```typescript const proceedToCheckout = (tier: 'growth' | 'pro', withVideo: boolean) => { setShowVideoDecision(false); if (tier === 'growth') { const returnUrl = `${PLATFORM_URL}/select-plan?whop_success=growth${withVideo ? '&video=true' : ''}`; const checkoutUrl = withVideo ? WHOP_GROWTH_VIDEO_URL : WHOP_GROWTH_URL; window.location.href = `${checkoutUrl}?redirect_uri=${encodeURIComponent(returnUrl)}`; } else { const returnUrl = `${PLATFORM_URL}/select-plan?whop_success=pro${withVideo ? '&video=true' : ''}`; window.location.href = `${WHOP_PRO_URL}?redirect_uri=${encodeURIComponent(returnUrl)}`; } }; ``` ### 7. Add VideoMarketingDecisionModal Add a new full-screen modal BEFORE the existing `showVideoPreview` modal (around line 654). This modal shows when `showVideoDecision === true`. Here is the complete JSX for this modal — use these exact styles (gold color `#d4b461`): The modal should: - Full-screen overlay with `background: "rgba(0,0,0,0.97)"` and `zIndex: 9999` - NOT close on overlay click (unlike preview modal) - Have a close/skip button (top right X) that calls `proceedToCheckout(decisionTier!, false)` - **Header section**: - Tier badge: Growth shows "Growth Plan · +$20/mo" in gold, Pro shows "Pro Plan · Included FREE" in green `#34d399` - Big headline: `🎬 Add Video Marketing?` - Subtitle: "Host webinars, build landing pages, track every viewer — all inside Oravini" - **Feature preview section** (4 feature blocks with icon, title, subtitle, 4 mini stat boxes each): 1. "Webinar Hosting" 🎥 — stats: "500 Attendees", "HD Streaming", "Live Q&A", "Screen Share" 2. "VSL & Video Pages" 📹 — stats: "Video Heatmaps", "Lead Gates", "CTA Overlays", "Custom Brand" 3. "Landing Pages" 📝 — stats: "Custom Domains", "Mobile Ready", "A/B Testing", "Email Capture" 4. "Analytics & CRM" 📊 — stats: "Attendance Rates", "Watch Time", "Conversions", "Replay Views" For Growth plan: also show a "What's different on Growth vs Pro" section showing Growth gets "Up to 3 live webinars/mo, Basic analytics, Email reminders" and Pro gets "Unlimited webinars, Full CRM, AI Clip Finder, White-label pages, Advanced heatmaps" For Pro plan: show a "🎉 Worth $20/mo — yours FREE" badge prominently - **Footer CTA section** (sticky at bottom of modal): - Pricing summary: Growth shows "+$20/mo added to $49/mo = $69/mo total", Pro shows "Included FREE with your $59/mo Pro plan" - Two buttons side by side: - Left button (gold, prominent): `Yes, Add Video Marketing →` → calls `proceedToCheckout(decisionTier!, true)` - Right button (subtle): `No Thanks, Continue Without` → calls `proceedToCheckout(decisionTier!, false)` Style the modal professionally with the existing dark color scheme (`#060606`, `#0a0a0a`). Use `overflow: "auto"` on the inner container. Max width 860px, max height 92vh. ## Important notes: - Keep the existing `showVideoPreview` modal completely unchanged (it's still used by the "Interactive Platform Preview" buttons in the cards) - Keep all WHOP URLs unchanged - Keep all useEffect logic for handling return from Whop unchanged - Keep `expandedFeatures` expand/collapse feature buttons in both Growth and Pro cards - Keep the `spin` keyframe animation - The file should still export `default function SelectPlan()` - Do NOT import any new packages — use only what's already imported (useState, useEffect, useLocation, useAuth, useToast, apiRequest, queryClient, Gift from lucide-react) Write the complete updated file.

Now I have the complete file. Let me write the updated version with all the required changes.

13:const WHOP_PRO_VIDEO_URL = "https://whop.com/checkout/plan_e0wfzKlT0upkU";
141:      apiRequest("POST", "/api/auth/confirm-plan", { plan: "starter", hasVideoMarketing: false })
150:      apiRequest("POST", "/api/auth/confirm-plan", { plan: "growth", hasVideoMarketing: hasVideo })

content.text:
All references to the old state vars are gone. The remaining `hasVideoMarketing` references are inside the useEffect API requests (intentionally preserved per the spec), and `WHOP_PRO_VIDEO_URL` is still declared as a constant — it's no longer used in the new `proceedToCheckout` (which uses `WHOP_PRO_URL` for both branches per the spec), but the constant declaration was not asked to be removed, so I left it intact to keep changes minimal.

Done. Rewrote `/Users/aryansurana/client/src/pages/SelectPlan.tsx` with all 7 requested changes:

1. **Removed** the `+$39`/`+$29` Optional Add-on section from inside the plan card map.
2. **Removed** the checkbox toggle divs from both the Growth and Pro card blocks; kept the "See all features" expand button (with collapsible features panel) and the "🎬 Interactive Platform Preview" button intact.
3. **State**: removed `videoMarketingGrowth`/`videoMarketingPro`; added `showVideoDecision` and `decisionTier` (with type `'growth' | 'pro' | null`); kept `expandedFeatures`, `showVideoPreview`, `previewTier`, `confirming`.
4. **Price display** simplified to always render `plan.price` + `plan.period`; removed `hasVideoMarketing`, `videoPrice`, `basePrice`, `totalPrice`.
5. **handlePlan** for `growth` / `pro` now sets `decisionTier` and opens the decision modal instead of redirecting to Whop.
6. **proceedToCheckout** added right after `handlePlan`; growth uses `WHOP_GROWTH_VIDEO_URL` vs `WHOP_GROWTH_URL` based on `withVideo`; pro uses `WHOP_PRO_URL` for both branches per spec.
7. **VideoMarketingDecisionModal** added before the existing preview modal — full-screen `rgba(0,0,0,0.97)` overlay at `zIndex: 9999`, no overlay-click dismiss, top-right `×` calls `proceedToCheckout(decisionTier, false)`. Includes:
   - Tier badge (gold "Growth Plan · +$20/mo" or green `#34d399` "Pro Plan · Included FREE")
   - Headline "🎬 Add Video Marketing?" + subtitle
   - Pro: "🎉 Worth $20/mo — yours FREE" badge
   - Four feature blocks (Webinar Hosting 🎥, VSL & Video Pages 📹, Landing Pages 📝, Analytics & CRM 📊) — each with title, subtitle, and four exact stat boxes as specified
   - Growth-only "What's different on Growth vs Pro" comparison panel with the exact bullet lists requested
   - Sticky footer with pricing summary and two CTAs: prominent gold "Yes, Add Video Marketing →" and subtle "No Thanks, Continue Without"
   - Container is `maxWidth: 860`, `maxHeight: "92vh"`, `overflow: "auto"`, dark `#060606`/`#0a0a0a` palette

**Preserved unchanged**: Whop URL constants, useEffect return-from-Whop logic, the existing `showVideoPreview` modal (its old "Add to My Plan" button now opens the decision modal instead of toggling removed state — minimal adjustment so it still functions correctly), `spin` keyframe, `expandedFeatures` collapsibles, and the `default function SelectPlan()` export. No new imports added.

**One small note**: The preview modal's footer "Add to My Plan" button previously called `setVideoMarketingGrowth(true)`/`setVideoMarketingPro(true)` — since those setters no longer exist, I rewired it to chain into the new decision modal (`setDecisionTier(previewTier); setShowVideoDecision(true)`) and relabeled it "Continue to Checkout →" so the flow stays coherent. The constant `WHOP_PRO_VIDEO_URL` is now unused but left declared.
